title: A Horse And Two Goats by R.K. Narayan | Summary in Hindi | BA Eng Hons
description:
Few writers have mined the comedy of cross-cultural misunderstanding quite like R.K. Narayan, and in A Horse and Two Goats, that comedy cuts surprisingly deep. Muni, a destitute Tamil villager who speaks no English, and a wealthy American tourist who speaks no Tamil, hold an entire conversation in which neither man understands a single word the other says — yet both walk away convinced the exchange went perfectly. This darkly funny short story is essential reading in the BA English Honours syllabus, exploring themes of poverty and colonial encounter with the quiet devastation Narayan made his signature.
